top.title: Gas and oil prices soar and shares tumble on fears conflict could escalate
top.summary: Markets react as the conflict in the Middle East intensifies and concerns grow over how long it will last.

top.title: Battered and isolated, Hezbollah drags Lebanon into another war
top.summary: Its attack on Israel in support of Iran has led to fresh mass displacements and Israeli bombing, to the fury of many Lebanese.

top.title: Six US soldiers killed in Iranian strike on Kuwait base
top.summary: The US defence secretary confirms a US military base was hit by Iran on Sunday.

top.title: OpenAI changes deal with US military after backlash
top.summary: Chief Executive Sam Altman said the group would prohibit the use of its systems to spy on Americans.

top.title: Amazon says drones damaged three facilities in UAE and Bahrain
top.summary: The incidents highlight the vulnerability of key technology infrastructure during military conflicts.

top.title: The spin-off game starring a 'weirdo' Pokémon that's got reviewers raving
top.summary: Pokopia, a game mixing Animal Crossing and Minecraft, has been a surprise hit with critics.
